reasons: Lolita can block ranged pressure and protect Karrie while Karrie repeatedly attacks frontline targets.
Karrie gains more time to stack Lightwheel Mark when Lolita creates a safer backline damage pocket.

proof.summary: Karrie needs sustained uptime, while Lolita reduces incoming ranged/projectile pressure and creates safer spacing.
worksBestWhen: Lolita stands between Karrie and enemy poke.
Karrie attacks from behind the frontline.

reasons: Minotaur gives Karrie a frontline and healing/control layer, helping her keep attacking during extended fights.
Karrie can deal sustained tank-shred damage while Minotaur absorbs pressure and disrupts divers.

proof.summary: Minotaur absorbs pressure and disrupts enemies, while Karrie deals sustained tank-shred damage from behind him.
worksBestWhen: Minotaur controls divers before they reach Karrie.
failureCases: Karrie is flanked before Minotaur can peel.
Enemy burst kills Karrie before the fight extends.

reasons: Tigreal can start fights for Karrie to follow or peel divers away so she keeps attacking.
Karrie can convert Tigreal's crowd control into sustained basic-attack damage.

proof.summary: Tigreal controls enemy movement with displacement and airborne effects, while Karrie converts the space into sustained basic-attack damage.
worksBestWhen: Tigreal saves control for divers or grouped enemies.
Karrie does not overstep before the engage.
failureCases: Tigreal engages too far from Karrie.
Karrie is caught before Tigreal can peel.
The enemy splits the fight and attacks Karrie from multiple angles.

reasons: Estes helps Karrie survive extended fights, which gives her more time to stack marks and deal sustained damage.
Karrie can stay near the frontline formation while Estes sustains her and nearby teammates.

proof.summary: Estes keeps Karrie and the frontline healthy, while Karrie uses the extended fight duration to stack Lightwheel Mark.
worksBestWhen: The team groups around Estes instead of taking scattered fights.
failureCases: The enemy bursts Karrie before healing can matter.

reasons: Angela can protect Karrie during high-pressure moments when enemy divers try to stop her attack uptime.
Karrie can keep attacking through a danger window when Angela adds shield and healing support.

proof.summary: Karrie needs to survive long enough to stack marks, while Angela adds shield and heal support during dive pressure or chase.
worksBestWhen: Angela saves Heartguard for the enemy dive.
Karrie has already reached a meaningful damage stage.
failureCases: The enemy chain-controls Karrie through the support window.
Karrie is too far from the rest of the team after Angela commits.
